title: frontend: mobile-first TS+xterm.js UI (login, switcher with status badges, landscape terminal)
action: Beautiful mobile-first SPA against the web contract: login (token), switcher (portrait, status badges working/blocked/done/idle with motion), landscape terminal (xterm.js, FitAddon, WS relay, hybrid rotate). Delegated to ui-ux-designer subagent. Dark-first design system.

prohibitions: No touching Rust or backend files

verify: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run && npm run typecheck

trace.outcome: Mobile-first xterm.js SPA delivered by ui-ux-designer: dark-first design system (699-line styles.css, palette #0b0e14 + blue accent + 4 dedicated status colors), login/switcher/terminal views, ws.ts relay client (base64 frame decode, full=true resets terminal, input/resize send, reconnect), typed api.ts. Bundles to /static, served + verified 200 end-to-end. Committed 89be198.
trace.verification_evidence: 15 vitest tests pass (api 8, ws 6, version 1), typecheck clean, bundle built in 569ms. Runtime-verified: herdctl --demo serves the SPA (index 200), assets (css 15669b + js 305825b) 200, SPA deep-link fallback 200. No AI-slop; real design system.
trace.verify_output: bundle built in 569ms (tsc noEmit clean + vite); 15 vitest pass (api 8, ws 6, version 1); typecheck clean; served UI + assets 200 via herdctl --demo (css 15669b, js 305825b, SPA deep-link fallback 200)
trace.verify_command: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run && npm run typecheck
